meta.description: Giulia Bertoluzzi Portfolio - Multimedia Journalist. Documentaries, reportage, humanitarian projects and multimedia content.
meta.title: Giulia Bertoluzzi | Journalist and Multimedia projects coordinator

hero.subtitle: Multimedia Journalist
hero.description: 14 years’ experience in journalism, documentary production and communications. Coordination and production of content in the context of humanitarian and political crises.

sections.servicesIntro: I am available to work on content strategy and production coordination.
sections.servicesCard1Desc: Developing editorial approaches. This includes editorial planning that balances impact with ethics, and risk assessment.
sections.servicesCard2Desc: Managing multimedia production projects from pre-production through delivery. I coordinate international teams, ensuring quality and consistency.
sections.servicesCard3Desc: Training journalists and communicators for field work. Sessions cover ethical storytelling in vulnerable contexts, advanced multimedia techniques, and managing the psychological impact of crisis reporting.
sections.contactTagline: Available for assignments, collaborations and consulting projects

sectionIntros.documentary-films: Feature-length documentaries on migration, far-right politics, and trafficking
sectionIntros.longform-reportage: In-depth investigations and field reporting across migration, conflict, and social justice (2013–2018)
sectionIntros.documentary-series: Documentary series produced for Solidarités International
sectionIntros.field-missions: Video reports from humanitarian field missions
sectionIntros.multimedia-projects-coordination: Exhibition coordination and multimedia project management
